comment: Redteam model selection is dynamic. This file is policy only: lineage names, provider order, and narrow model-specific overrides. Kimi/models.dev plus live provider /models decide which concrete model ids are runnable.

lineages.deepseek: DeepSeek lineage via configured aggregators; no direct deepseek.com credits assumed.

disabled_lineages_comment: Lineages excluded from automatic random/backfill/scatter selection after trace evidence. Explicit --models may still target them for diagnosis.

disabled_lineages.nemotron: 2026-06-20 nosession-RSZcsS: ollama-cloud/nemotron-3-ultra narrated/no verdict after retries; no alternate provider configured.

deprioritized_lineages_comment: Lineages kept available but moved to the end of automatic candidate pools after recent poor signal/cost.

deprioritized_lineages.deepseek: 2026-06-20 nosession-RSZcsS: ollama/alibaba narrated and opencode-go/deepseek-v4-pro returned 401 disabled.

disabled_models_comment: Exact provider/model refs skipped inside lineage fallback chains. Use only for confirmed disabled/broken provider entries, not temporary quota.

disabled_models.opencode-go/deepseek-v4-pro: 2026-06-20 nosession-RSZcsS: provider returned 401 Model is disabled.

lineage_provider_seeds_comment: Ordered provider preference per lineage for live /models discovery. First entry = primary. Do not infer cross-lineage fallback.
provider_priority_comment: Compatibility fallback for older runners only. Current runner uses lineage_provider_seeds.
free_comment: Zero-cost models are discovered live from provider catalogs; this is only an empty fallback.
model_params_comment: Narrow redteam overrides only: one wire-format exception and one temperature exception. Concrete model selection stays dynamic.
